March 23, 2009, General Electric Company ("GE") issued a press release responding to the downgrade by Moody's Investors Service of GE's and General Electric Capital Corporation's long-term ratings from Aaa to Aa2, with a "stable" outlook.

March 12, 2009, General Electric Company ("GE") issued a press release responding to the single-notch downgrade by Standard & Poor's of GE's and General Electric Capital Corporation's long-term ratings from AAA to AA+, with a "stable" outlook.

February 27, 2009, General Electric Company ("GE") issued a press release announcing that its board of directors plans to reduce GE's quarterly dividend to $.10 per share starting in the second half of 2009.

January 27, 2009, General Electric Company ("GE") issued a press release responding to Moody's announcement that it would review the Aaa long-term ratings of GE and General Electric Capital Corporation for possible downgrade.
September 25, 2008, General Electric Company (the "Company" or "GE") issued a press release updating GE's guidance and operating plan.

July 22, 2008, General Electric Company ("GE") and Mubadala Development Company ("Mubadala"), headquartered in Abu Dhabi, UAE, announced a framework agreement on a global partnership encompassing a broad range of initiatives including commercial finance, clean energy research and development, aviation, industry and corporate learning.
July 10, 2008, General Electric Company (the "Company") announced its intent to explore strategic options for its Consumer & Industrial business.
